name: example-html-ppt-zhangzara-biennale-yellow
title: Html Ppt Zhangzara Biennale Yellow
description: Biennale Yellow — Solar yellow on warm parchment with deep indigo serif and atmospheric sun-glow gradients. Anything that should feel like an art-biennale poster or a museum's annual programme: exhibition decks, arts-institution announcements, design conference brochures, curatorial pitches, literary publications, studio retrospectives.
